content.message:
The user's query asks for the completion year of Adrian Smith's building with specific features (71 stories, 309.6 m height, clean technology neofuturistic skyscraper). After extensive SPARQL query refinement, the closest match in Wikidata for a building designed by Adrian Smith (wd:Q374276) that aligns with the description is the Pearl River Tower (wd:Q967541). The actual values in Wikidata are 70 stories (slightly off from the user's 71) and 329.1 m height (close to the user's 309.6 m, likely a typo). Its completion date is 2010-02-21, so the year is 2010.

The correct SPARQL query to retrieve this was not yielding results due to strict value matching in Wikidata (70 stories vs. user's 71, and 329.1 m vs. 309.6 m), but the most accurate match based on known buildings attributed to Adrian Smith is the Pearl River Tower, completed in 2010.
